title: Update Parwati Dairy logo with new design

requirements.text: Replace the existing Parwati Dairy logo throughout the application with the new logo design featuring dairy products (milk can, pitcher, glass, butter), pastoral farm scene with cows and trees, decorative milk splash and green leaves, and blue ribbon banner with 'Parwati Dairy' text in cream-colored script font
acceptanceCriteria: New logo is displayed in the header/Layout component
New logo appears on the Home page hero section
Logo maintains proper aspect ratio and quality at different screen sizes
Logo integrates seamlessly with the existing warm dairy-themed color scheme

constraints: Maintain the existing warm, trustworthy color scheme (avoid blue and purple theme changes)
Preserve all existing functionality and navigation
Ensure mobile-optimized display of the new logo
nonGoals: Changing the product offerings or pricing
Altering the contact information or business details

required: Parwati Dairy logo with dairy products (milk can, pitcher, glass, butter blocks), pastoral farm scene with brown and white cows grazing in green fields with trees and red barn, decorative milk splash and green leaves border, blue ribbon banner with 'Parwati Dairy' in cream script font, gold trim accents (parwati-dairy-logo.dim_800x800.png)
